title: Mahoney Environmental Achieves Dual ISCC Certifications, Expanding Feedstock Options for Clean Fuels
content: Mahoney Environmental Solutions achieved International Sustainability and Carbon Certification for both EU and CORSIA programs, enabling the company to supply verified feedstocks to manufacturers of renewable diesel and sustainable aviation fuel while formally verifying its collected used cooking oil as genuine waste and residue under international sustainability standards. The company said the ISCC Certification opens doors to new markets, creates competitive advantages by showing compliance with increasingly stringent sustainability regulations, and provides third party verification of responsible sourcing practices to build trust with buyers. As a subsidiary of Neste, Mahoney supports the supply chain for clean fuels amid growing demand for verified sustainable materials as airlines work to meet carbon reduction commitments and governments implement renewable fuel standards. Executives added that certification transforms feedstock into a verified sustainable commodity that can secure long term contracts with environmentally conscious manufacturers, while Mahoney continues to manage the recycling process and serve food service operators nationwide.
author: Analysts Account
